saints.name: Apostle James the Brother of Saint John the Theologian

troparion.text: You were a chosen Apostle of Christ  / and the only brother of the beloved Theologian.  /  O most praised James, entreat Him to grant the remission of sins and great mercy  /  to those who sing hymns to you.

kontakion.text: You heard the divine voice when it called to you, O glorious James;  / therefore, casting off the love of father, friends, and companions,  / together with your brother John, you hastened to Christ,  / and you were worthy to behold the divine Transfiguration of the Lord.

saints.name: Uncovering of the relics of Saint Nikḗtas, Bishop of Novgorod

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Nikita, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

saints.name: Saint Donatus, Bishop of Euroea in Epirus

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Donatus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

saints.name: Uncovering of the relics of Saint Basil, Bishop of Amasea

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Basil, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

Your holy martyr Maximus, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Maximus;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

saints.name: Saint Ignatius Brianchaninov, Bishop of the Caucasus and Stavropol

troparion.text: You were shown as the chosen beloved of Christ, united to Him by many afflictions and unceasing prayer;  / and having received the grace of the Holy Spirit, you were an exemplary teacher for the people.  / Remember us, O holy hierarch Ignatius, God-bearer of Russia,  / that by your teachings and prayers, we may find saving repentance,  / and, with heartfelt love, be found in Christ.*

kontakion.text: While traversing the path of this earthly life, O hierarch Ignatius, /  nonetheless, unceasingly you observed the laws of eternal life, which you taught to your disciples.  / Wherefore, O holy Father, pray that we may follow them as well.

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Argyra, O Lord, / through her sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, she laid low her adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through her intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Argyra;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.
